textEn: By the fig and the olive,
and by this secure city [of Makkah],

textAr: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
textEn: Surely We have created man in the best form,
textTranslit: Laqad khalaqnal insaana fee ahsani taqweem

textEn: then We will reduce him to the lowest of the low,
textTranslit: Thumma ra dad naahu asfala saafileen

textAr: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
textEn: except those who believe and do righteous deeds; they will have a never-ending reward.
textTranslit: Ill-lal lazeena aamanoo wa 'amilus saalihaati; falahum ajrun ghairu mamnoon

textEn: Then, what makes you deny the Judgment Day?
textTranslit: Fama yu kaz zibuka b'adu bid deen

textEn: Is not Allah the Most Just of all judges?
